documents.rationale: Stable project introduction with a deterministic current-state capsule; historical body remains stable.
documents.supersession_rule: Keep path stable; current section must derive from docs/current/STATE.json.
documents.update_trigger: Change stable introduction only on project identity changes; regenerate current capsule on state transitions.

documents.supersession_rule: Update with component contract/version change.
documents.update_trigger: Component ownership or public interface change.

documents.update_trigger: Component ownership or public interface change.

documents.supersession_rule: Add new version and explicit compatibility policy.
documents.update_trigger: New contract version only.

documents.supersession_rule: Add new version and explicit compatibility policy.

documents.supersession_rule: Do not mutate published schema; add version.
documents.update_trigger: New schema version only.

documents.supersession_rule: Commit new lock with evidence; historical authorities bind old lock digest.
documents.update_trigger: Only when selected product/dependency input changes.

documents.rationale: Complete human temporal view generated from the sole current source.
documents.supersession_rule: Never hand-edit after generator adoption.
documents.update_trigger: Regenerate after every accepted current-state transition.

documents.supersession_rule: Amend through a dedicated operations decision and changelog entry.
documents.update_trigger: Explicit collaboration-policy change.

documents.rationale: Top-level navigation generated from state and registry; directory-level indexes remain Phase 3.
documents.supersession_rule: Never carry claim prose; point to authoritative documents.
documents.update_trigger: Regenerate when registry, state, or file inventory changes.

documents.rationale: Legacy files contain active/next language relative to old commits.
documents.supersession_rule: Registry must mark snapshot date/commit and superseded_by current state.
documents.update_trigger: Never edit.

documents.rationale: The byte-preserved file contains E2-P2-era current/next language and is coupled to historical verifiers.
documents.supersession_rule: Registry marks this snapshot superseded for current-state purposes by docs/current/STATE.json.
documents.update_trigger: Never edit.

documents.rationale: Stable onboarding procedure with deterministic current reading block.
documents.supersession_rule: Keep stable procedure, derive current reading order.
documents.update_trigger: Change procedure on collaboration-policy changes; regenerate reading list from registry/state.

documents.supersession_rule: Update with corresponding ADR.
documents.update_trigger: Accepted architecture ownership or component-boundary change.

documents.supersession_rule: Never hand-edit; generated from registry v3.

documents.rationale: Sole writable temporal authority.
documents.supersession_rule: Increment state_revision in place; historical authorities bind immutable snapshots, never this path.
documents.update_trigger: Accepted transition of current repository work, program gate, blockers, risks, or authority identities.

documents.rationale: Versioned schema for the sole temporal source.
documents.supersession_rule: Do not mutate v1 after freeze; add a new schema version.
documents.update_trigger: New state schema version only.

documents.rationale: Defines the single-writer and generated-view contract.
documents.supersession_rule: Amend by a new versioned governance record; preserve prior authority bytes.
documents.update_trigger: Explicit change to temporal authority or rendering rules.

documents.rationale: Normative documentation lifecycle constitution.
documents.supersession_rule: Supersede through an explicit documentation-governance version or ADR.
documents.update_trigger: Lifecycle class, authority-domain, or migration-rule change.

documents.rationale: Normative generated-navigation contract.
documents.supersession_rule: Supersede with a versioned governance contract.

documents.rationale: documentation governance index
documents.supersession_rule: Never hand-edit; generated from registry v3.

documents.rationale: Phase 2 schema permits a current source and generated views.
documents.supersession_rule: Do not mutate after Phase 2 freeze; add a new schema version.
documents.update_trigger: New registry schema version only.

documents.rationale: Schema for full generated navigation.
documents.supersession_rule: Supersede with a versioned schema.
documents.update_trigger: Never edit; add a new schema version.

documents.rationale: Complete lifecycle control-plane registry.
documents.supersession_rule: Update atomically with the document-set change; Git records prior versions.
documents.update_trigger: Any tracked Markdown/JSON add, remove, rename, lifecycle, ownership, or supersession change.

documents.rationale: Machine-readable registry contract.
documents.supersession_rule: Add a new schema version rather than silently changing semantics.
documents.update_trigger: A new registry schema version is required.

documents.rationale: Exact grandfathered live-document file-identity bindings.
documents.supersession_rule: Create a new versioned baseline with explicit predecessor and adjudication.
documents.update_trigger: Never for ordinary work; correct only through a new baseline authority.

documents.supersession_rule: Registry links later corrections without rewriting closure.
documents.update_trigger: Never edit; create a new closure correction or successor authority.

documents.supersession_rule: No claim prose; index only.
